tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: The teacher asked the students to _______ attention during the lesson.
Could you _______ me a favour and post this letter?
It's important to _______ a healthy diet if you want to stay fit.
She _______ a deep breath before walking onto the stage.
We need to _______ a decision by the end of the day.
He couldn't _______ the difference between the two paintings.
I'm going to _______ an exam next week, so I need to study hard.
The shop assistant was very helpful and gave us good _______.
Despite the bad weather, we had a really _______ time at the festival.
She _______ an apology for her rude behaviour.
